basic_details.organization_name: Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC)
basic_details.short_information: Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) Engineer (Electrical) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of ACTREC. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ACTREC Engineer (Electrical) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation may be relaxed on experience basis.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech in Electrical Engineering OR Diploma in Electrical Engineering with relevant experience
qualification.details: Full time B.E./B.Tech in Electrical Engineering with First class from AICTE approved college / University with minimum 05 years post qualification experience. OR Full time Diploma with First class in Electrical Engineering from State Board of Technical Examination with 07 years post qualification experience. Willing to work in shift duties including nights, Sundays and Holidays. Preference will be given to candidates having experience in execution of Hospital/Commercial/ High Rise residential building projects.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download ACTREC Engineer Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download ACTREC Engineer Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.advanced_centre_for_treatment_research_a: B.E./B.Tech in Electrical Engineering OR Diploma in Electrical Engineering with relevant experience

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Engineer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ACTREC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ACTREC Engineer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Engineer Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Full time B.E./B.Tech in Electrical Engineering with First class from AICTE approved college / University with minimum 05 years post qualification experience. OR Full time Diploma with First class in Electrical Engineering from State Board of Technical Examination with 07 years post qualification experience. Willing to work in shift duties including nights, Sundays and Holidays. Preference will be given to candidates having experience in execution of Hospital/Commercial/ High Rise residential building projects.

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Engineer Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation may be relaxed on experience basis.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ACTREC Engineer (Electrical) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ACTREC Engineer (Electrical) recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a Walk-in Interview, and the interview is scheduled for 24th July 2026. Candidates should report on this date with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Engineer (Electrical) post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Full time B.E./B.Tech in Electrical Engineering with First class and 5 years of experience, or a Full time Diploma in Electrical Engineering with First class and 7 years of experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Engineer (Electrical) post is 35 years. Age relaxation may be provided based on experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Engineer (Electrical) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 50,000/- to Rs. 65,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the ACTREC located?
faq.answer: ACTREC is located in Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, with the pincode 410210.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any preference given to certain candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, preference will be given to candidates having experience in the execution of Hospital/Commercial/High Rise residential building projects.

faq.question: Q10. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The job is on a contractual basis.
